hypotheses.name: Predictive Suppression
hypotheses.description: Expected input is suppressed, sharpened, or explained away.

hypotheses.name: Feedforward Error Propagation
hypotheses.description: Unpredicted mismatch propagates through ascending cortical pathways.

hypotheses.name: Ubiquity
hypotheses.description: Predictive mechanisms generalize across areas, modalities, species, states, or scales.
